\tzpentry{ID4209}{Quantum State Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4209 introduces Quantum State Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} |\Psi\rangle_{S^3} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\left(|\uparrow\rangle_\chi \otimes |\downarrow\rangle_{\pi-\chi} + |\downarrow\rangle_\chi \otimes |\uparrow\rangle_{\pi-\chi}\right) \end{equation}
